title: <task> Fix a critical N-way duplicate message sending bug in the LINE Harness worker. The scheduled() function iterates over N active LINE accounts and calls processStepDeliveries/processScheduledBroadcasts/processReminderDeliveries once per account, but each delivery function fetches ALL due items...
summary_text: Applied the duplicate-send fix in the requested scope. - [packages/db/src/scenarios.ts:46](/Users/masayuki/Dev/line-harness-oss/packages/db/src/scenarios.ts#L46) adds `FriendScenarioDue`, and [packages/db/src/scenarios.ts:362](/Users/masayuki/Dev/line-harness-oss/packages/db/src/scenarios.ts#L362) now joins `scenarios` so due step deliveries include `line_account_id` while keeping the existing JST epoch filter. I also re-exported the type at [packages/db/src/index.ts:5](/Users/masayuki/Dev/line-harness-oss/packages/db/src/index.ts#L5). - [apps/worker/src/services/step-delivery.ts:71](/Users/masayuki/Dev/line-harness-oss/apps/worker/src/services/step-delivery.ts#L71) now accepts `accountTokenMap`, and [apps/worker/src/services/step-delivery.ts:99](/Users/masayuki/Dev/line-harness-oss/apps/worker/src/services/step-delivery.ts#L99) adds the CAS claim on `friend_scenarios.next_delivery_at` before any fetch/send work. The same function resolves an account-specific `LineClient` from `fs.line_account_id` and uses it for `pushMessage`. - [apps/worker/src/services/broadcast.ts:16](/Users/masayuki/Dev/line-harness-oss/apps/worker/src/services/broadcast.ts#L16) now claims broadcasts with `UPDATE ... SET status = 'sending' WHERE status IN ('draft', 'scheduled')`; if another worker already claimed it, the existing broadcast is returned instead of throwing. - [apps/worker/src/index.ts:139](/Users/masayuki/Dev/line-harness-oss/apps/worker/src/index.ts#L139) no longer loops per active account. It builds one `accountTokenMap`, creates one default client, and invokes `processStepDeliveries`, `processScheduledBroadcasts`, and `processReminderDeliveries` once each, while keeping `checkAccountHealth`. Verification: - `npx tsc --noEmit` at repo root does not run a project here because there is no root `tsconfig.json`. - `npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/db/tsconfig.json` passes. - `npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json` is currently blocked by an unrelated existing error at [apps/worker/src/routes/webhook.ts:285](/Users/masayuki/Dev/line-harness-oss/apps/worker/src/routes/webhook.ts#L285): `Cannot find name 'c'`. I did not change that file because you restricted edits to the listed files.
